Products / High & Low Voltage Switchgears

High & Low Voltage
Switchgears

Safe, reliable switchgear solutions for HV distribution, LV motor control, and ring main network applications.

6kV–35kV

HV Range

IEC 62271

HV Standard

IEC 61439

LV Standard

IP67

Max Protection

HV6kV – 35kV

High Voltage Switchgear

Metal-clad and metal-enclosed HV switchgear for primary distribution, industrial plants, and power utilities. Designed for safe operation and easy maintenance.

  • Vacuum / SF6 circuit breakers
  • Withdrawable or fixed type
  • Bus bar protection relay
  • IEC 62271 certified
  • Interlocking safety system
Request Quote
LV380V – 1000V

Low Voltage Switchgear (MCC / PCC)

Low voltage switchgear panels for motor control, power distribution, and capacitor bank applications. Modular design for easy expansion.

  • IEC 61439 certified
  • MCC / PCC / APFC panels
  • ACB / MCCB / MCB equipped
  • Form 2B / 3B / 4B separation
  • PLC and SCADA ready
Request Quote
RMU12kV / 24kV

Ring Main Units (RMU)

Compact ring main units for secondary network distribution, cable loops, and underground switchgear installations in urban environments.

  • Compact gas-insulated design
  • Load break switch + fuse
  • SCADA / RTU compatible
  • IP67 rated stainless enclosure
  • Maintenance-free SF6 gas
Request Quote
